title: Terraplex Dealer Spoke Config
description: Per-dealer configuration for a Terraplex dealer site. Lives as spoke.config.json in the dealer's repo and pins against a specific hub version.

_comment.description: Optional human-facing comment (JSON has no native comments). Used for documentation-only files like example.spoke.config.json.

hub.description: Identifies which hub and which hub version this spoke builds against.

name.description: Must be 'terraplex'. Constrains this schema to Terraplex-hub spokes.

version.description: Semver version of the hub this spoke pins to. Must match a released hub.json version.

dealer.description: Dealer business identity and contact details.

id.description: Kebab-case slug identifying the dealer. Used as the dealer folder name and as the 'dealer' key in archetypes/_index.json takenBy entries.

businessName.description: Legal or trading business name as displayed on the site.

ownerName.description: Primary owner or main point of contact.

email.description: Primary contact email for the dealer.

phone.description: Primary contact phone number as it should appear on the site.

location.description: Physical headquarters location of the dealer.

serviceArea.description: States or regions the dealer serves. Single string (e.g. 'nationwide', 'Iowa') or an array of state names.

identity.description: Visual identity choices that drive the dealer site's look and messaging.

archetype.description: Design archetype id from archetypes/_index.json. Determines theme, hero treatment, card style, and typography approach.

accent.description: Dealer's brand accent color system. Primary is the main brand color. Secondary is used when mode is 'gradient' or 'dual'.

primary.description: Primary accent color as a 6-digit hex code.

secondary.description: Secondary accent color, required when mode is 'gradient' or 'dual'.

mode.description: How the accent is applied. 'solid' uses primary only. 'gradient' uses primary-to-secondary gradients on CTAs and key elements. 'dual' treats primary and secondary as equal-weight brand colors.

headline.description: Hero headline unique to this dealer.

tagline.description: Optional subtitle shown below the headline. Most dealers have a single headline only — omit this field unless the dealer has a distinct two-line treatment.

logo.description: Dealer logo. Either an image (file or URL) or a text wordmark.

type.description: 'image' uses src (file path or URL). 'wordmark' uses text.

src.description: Image source (required when type is 'image'). Can be a repo-relative path or an absolute URL.

drones.description: GTEEX Revolution drone platforms carried by this dealer. Values must match product ids in products/.

services.description: Services offered by the dealer. Values constrained to questionnaire.json fields.services.allowedValues.

story.description: Dealer narrative content used in About and Why-Choose sections.

founded.description: Year the business was founded (as a string, e.g. '2019').

notableFacts.description: Short factual bullets about the dealer (veteran-owned, family farm, FAA-certified, acres covered, etc.).

ownerBio.description: 2-3 paragraph owner/founder biography, used in the About section.

additionalEquipment.description: Optional: additional equipment the dealer carries (trailers, skids, etc.).

competitorDrones.description: Optional: non-GTEEX drone brands the dealer also carries. Acknowledged but not featured prominently on the site.

font.description: Optional font preference. 'system' (default) uses the Tailwind system stack. Other values should name a Google Font (e.g. 'Montserrat').

referenceSites.description: URLs the dealer wants referenced for visual or structural comparison — competitors, inspiration sites, or their own existing site being replaced.

social.description: Optional social media URLs, used in footer icon links.

formFields.description: Contact form configuration. Every form has the base fields (Name/Email/Phone/Message). Dealers can add extra qualifying or intent fields.

base.description: Whether to include the standard base fields (Name/Email/Phone/Message). Should be true for all dealers.

extraFields.description: Additional form fields specific to this dealer's sales process. Optional.

label.description: Human-readable label shown on the form.

options.description: Available options when type is 'select'. Required for select, ignored otherwise.

required.description: Whether this field is required. Defaults to false.

specialRequests.description: Optional: dealer special requests (scheduling, reviews integration, specific page structure, etc.). Log in dealer NOTES.md as follow-ups if they can't be done in static HTML.

clientQuirks.description: Optional: non-obvious things the client insists on or has rejected before.
